description: Perfect for sharp casual wear as well as elegant evening wear, this maroon crushed cotton duppatta from aurelia is that perfect style redefined. Pair it not just with kurtas and kurtis, but even over select jeans and T-shirt combinations for unparalleled cool.Length: 225 cmWidth: 100 cmHand wash separately using a mild detergentLine dry in shadeDo not ironCrush roll whenever not in use Perfect for sharp casual wear as well as elegant evening wear, this maroon crushed cotton duppatta from Aurelia is that perfect style redefined.
